creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Created attachment 211231
svn-diff-man-ocserv

For any reason the ronn commands in the ${WRKSRC}/doc/Makefile does not work.
Maybe, this patch is a workaround or you find a way to correct the doc/Makefile.

----

Btw, a new version of ocserv exists: 0.12.6 (28.12.2019)
ftp://ftp.infradead.org/pub/ocserv/
or
https://ocserv.gitlab.io/www/download.html

In this version all three manpages (ocserv.8, ocpasswd.8 and occtl.8 must created with ronn -r)
